nameForms.fullText: Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont

burialPlace.address: Joinville, Departement de la Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Marguerite de Joinville, sceau 1408- 1411 comtesse de Vaudémont : Un écu parti, à dextre à la bande chargée de trois alérions et au lambel à trois pendants (Lorraine), à senestre coupé, en pointe au fascé de dix pièces (Vaudémont), en chef à trois broyes ouvertes et au chef chargé d'un lion issant (Joinville). Cet écu est timbré d'un ange à mi-corps sommé d'une étoile, soutenu aux flancs par deux lions accroupis affrontés et en pointe par une chauve-souris. Le tout est dans un quadrilobe à accolades, à redents fermés, orné d'étoiles aux écoinçons.
29 mars 1408 : Fondation d'anniversaire au chapitre de Joinville par Ferry Ier de Vaudémont et sa femme Marguerite

Commentaire 
"L'an de grace nostre seigneur mil quatre cens et huit selond lusaige du diocese de Chaalons, et selond lusaige du diocese de Toul l'an mil quatre cens et nuef"

10 et 11 septembre 1411 : Vente par Ferri et Marguerite de Joinville, sa femme, à Amédée VIII, comte de Savoie, de tous  les droits de Marguerite en Genevois, notamment sur la Roche, Rumilly-sous-Cornillon et Ballaison

relevé JPR Teyssier Chalancon Mangas

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont於1354年1月出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希時，她的父親Sire Henry V de Joinville Count of Vaudemont27歲，母親Marie de Luxembourg24歲。她於1393年與Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年4月28日在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾享年63歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont于1354年1月出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希时，她的父亲Sire Henry V de Joinville Count of Vaudemont27岁，母亲Marie de Luxembourg24岁。她于1393年与Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1417年4月28日在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾享年63岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont was born in January 1354, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Sire Henry V de Joinville Count of Vaudemont, was 27 and her mother, Marie de Luxembourg, was 24. She married Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont in 1393. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 28 April 1417, in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 63, and was buried in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont est née en janvier 1354, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Sire Henry V de Joinville Count of Vaudemont, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Marie de Luxembourg, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont en 1393. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 avril 1417, à Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont im Januar 1354 in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sire Henry V de Joinville Count of Vaudemont 27 und ihre Mutter Marie de Luxembourg 24. Sie hat 1393 Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. April 1417 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont è nata il nel gennaio 1354 nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Sire Henry V de Joinville Count of Vaudemont, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Marie de Luxembourg, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont nel 1393. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 aprile 1417, nel Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemontが1354年1月にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシで生まれた時，父Sire Henry V de Joinville Count of Vaudemontは27歳，母Marie de Luxembourgは24歳であった。1393年にFrederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年4月28日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンジョインヴィルで63歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンジョインヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont(이)가 1354년 1월 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sire Henry V de Joinville Count of Vaudemont(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Luxembourg(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1393년 Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 4월 28일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 조인빌에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 조인빌에 묻혔다.

mn.Jan 1354–28 April 1417: 1354 оны Нэгдүгээр сар–1417 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 28

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont nasceu em janeiro de 1354, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Sire Henry V de Joinville Count of Vaudemont, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Luxembourg, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont em 1393. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de abril de 1417, em Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont родилась январь 1354 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Sire Henry V de Joinville Count of Vaudemont было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Luxembourg, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont в 1393 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 28 апреля 1417 г. в местности джоинвилл, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности джоинвилл, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite II de Joinville Comtesse de Vaudemont nació en enero de 1354, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Sire Henry V de Joinville Count of Vaudemont, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Marie de Luxembourg, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Frederick de Lorraine Count of Vaudémont en 1393. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de abril de 1417, en Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
